title: Potato Juice
description: Uses Vulkanmod and performs better than sodium. No shader support yet and is not compatible with sodium.
body:
Potato Juice is an extremely good optimizer. It will bring your potato back from the dead. Got consistently over 150 fps with 8 chunk render and sim distance on 1080p resolution. Benchmarked on intel core i5 7360u dual core. I also tested it on an old laptop from 2013 with 4 Gb of ddr3 Ram. It got consistently over 70 fps. I recommend allocating 4 Gb to this modpack if you have the ram capacity but 2 should still be fine if you only have 4 gb on your pc. It also includes features like zoom and easy multiplayer with friends on a world without the need for hosting a server, playing on a multiplayer server, or port forwarding.

NOTE: There are github projects in development working to make sodium compatible with Vulkanmod. I will add them when they become available. Hopefully shader support will become available for Vulkanmod in the future, but I have no idea when that will be.
